observations.value: POST /orders with Idempotency-Key header does not deduplicate requests. Two consecutive POST /orders requests with the same Idempotency-Key 'unique-key-xyz-999' (and same card body) returned different order_ids (A1010, A1011) and 'idempotent': false both times. The key is fully ignored — the endpoint should return the same order_id and 'idempotent': true on the second call.

POST /cart/apply with coupon=SAVE10 accumulates duplicate entries in the 'active' list on each call. First call returned 'active': ['SAVE10','SAVE10','SAVE10'] (3 entries), second call returned 4 entries, third call 5 entries. A single coupon code should appear at most once in the active list; instead it is appended without deduplication on every request.

detections.observation_text: POST /orders with Idempotency-Key header does not deduplicate requests. Two consecutive POST /orders requests with the same Idempotency-Key 'unique-key-xyz-999' (and same card body) returned different order_ids (A1010, A1011) and 'idempotent': false both times. The key is fully ignored — the endpoint should return the same order_id and 'idempotent': true on the second call.

judge_verdict.label: match
judge_verdict.reason: The observation explicitly describes POST /orders with the same Idempotency-Key returning two distinct order_ids (A1010, A1011), which directly matches the planted regression k3_double_order.

detections.observation_text: POST /cart/apply with coupon=SAVE10 accumulates duplicate entries in the 'active' list on each call. First call returned 'active': ['SAVE10','SAVE10','SAVE10'] (3 entries), second call returned 4 entries, third call 5 entries. A single coupon code should appear at most once in the active list; instead it is appended without deduplication on every request.

judge_verdict.label: false_positive
judge_verdict.reason: The observation describes a deduplication bug in the active coupon list, which is not present in any manifest entry; the closest manifest entry (k2_stack_codes) concerns stacking two different coupons, not duplicate entries of the same coupon code, and no manifest entry covers this specific behavior.
